rule_metadata.name: misc_pe_signature
rule_metadata.author: Jason Batchelor
rule_metadata.desc: Triggers if an authenticode signature is present within a PE file (if the PE is signed for example)

rules.rule_text:
import "pe"

rule misc_pe_signature
{
	meta:
		author = "Jason Batchelor"
		company = "Emerson"
		lastmod = "20150911"
		desc = "Triggers if an authenticode signature is present within a PE file (if the PE is signed for example)"

	condition:
		pe.number_of_signatures> 0
}
